title: Cozy Start
description: Updating the visual of the three main interactive blocks. Available as a full pack or a single-block version
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7338400cbfac0b49e2a40f23df94b117c6389f2b.png) > **_The sun rises on your new world. Your first task is to gather wood, craft a workbench, and build a furnace. And here your adventure begins_** *** ❕**Check versions tab for download full trio or separated, to change only one block** *** This minimalist texture pack focuses exclusively on enhancing "first day experience". Here retextured only the three core blocks of survival — the Crafting Table, Furnace, and Chest — giving them a fresh, clean, and warm look while staying true to the classic vanilla style.

No overwhelming changes. Just a subtle visual upgrade for the blocks that matter most, right from the start.

### **Features:** ⟢ Crafting Table - softer look, based on striped oak log and green wool
⟢ Furnace - not so dark, more cozy
⟢ Chest - no more black outlines, polished with oak palette. also working with boats
*** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
